name: XAUUSD_M5_AsiaLondonBreakout_ATR
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, when the Asia session (00:00-06:00 UTC) builds a compressed range (0.5-2.0 ATR) and London session (07:00-10:00 UTC) breaks out with a strong body, directional follow-through persists long enough to yield >1.5R before mean reversion.

long: breakout occurs within first 9 M5 bars of 07:00 UTC
only first breakout of the day
short: breakout occurs within first 9 M5 bars of 07:00 UTC
only first breakout of the day

exit_rules.stop_loss: 1.3 * ATR(14) from entry (opposite side of asia_range edge)
exit_rules.time_stop: close at 15:00 UTC or after 36 M5 bars, whichever first

falsification: Reject if PF<2.0 or trades<200 over 2y backtest, or if >60% of signals occur outside first 9 bars (structural invalidation).
